---
title: "Frances Elizabeth Nelson, Countess Nelson"
---

## Frances Elizabeth Nelson, Countess Nelson

**Dates:** (d.1878)

**Maiden name:** (Eyre)

### Description

friend of FMY, mother of [[person:164]Susan Blunt]

### Biography

Daughter of John Maurice Eyre of Brickworth, she married (1821) the second Earl Nelson of Trafalgar (d.1835).  Her husband was the son of Thomas Bolton and Susannah Nelson, sister of the naval hero.  He changed his surname to Nelson on inheriting the title by special remainder from another uncle shortly before his death.

### Letters

- Letter from April 11 [1900]
- Letter from 
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
